recommendations.title: Dad in Training
recommendations.overview: Following the breakdown of his marriage, a self-involved man begins to embrace fatherhood.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Ride On
recommendations.overview: A washed-up stuntman and his stunt horse become an overnight social media sensation when their real-life fight with debt collectors goes viral.

recommendations.title: Follow Me
recommendations.overview: A social media personality travels with his friends to Moscow to capture new content for his successful vlog. Always pushing the limits and catering to a growing audience, they enter a cold world of mystery, excess, and danger. When the lines between

recommendations.title: Ernest & Celestine
recommendations.overview: Celestine is a little mouse trying to avoid a dental career while Ernest is a big bear craving an artistic outlet. When Celestine meets Ernest, they overcome their natural enmity by forging a life of crime together.
recommendations.director: Vincent Patar, Benjamin Renner, Stéphane Aubier

recommendations.title: The Cleansing Hour
recommendations.overview: Two millennial entrepreneurs stage elaborate fake exorcisms on social media until one of their girlfriends becomes possessed by a demon.

recommendations.title: The Guide to the Perfect Family
recommendations.overview: A couple in Québec deals with the pitfalls, pressure and high expectations of raising kids in a society obsessed with success and social media image.

recommendations.title: To the Bone
recommendations.overview: A young woman dealing with anorexia meets an unconventional doctor who challenges her to face her condition and embrace life.

recommendations.title: Sissy

recommendations.title: My Fake Boyfriend
